title: エリザベス女王杯の後に・Respect

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Congratulations, Fine. ...That was superb.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'm frustrated, but I must admit that you're a
skilled runner.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...It's unfortunate that I won't have an opportunity
to beat you.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Are you perhaps telling me you're going to miss
me?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...I'm losing my roommate soon. Do I really seem
so cold that I can't be allowed the sentiment?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
No, that's not what I meant! If anything, I'm the
cold one...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Instead of being sad with you, I'm happy—happy
to have become one of your memories.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Knowing I'll live on inside of your heart makes me
so happy... Do you think that's cold?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hmph... You've always been like that. But I'm not
the only who will remember you.

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Yeeeaaah!
Go, Fine Motion!

text_block_list.name: Spectators A and B
text_block_list.text: Fiiiiine Motiooon! Sniffle... Yeeeaaah!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You hear them, don't you? Your memory will live
on in all of their hearts.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
And it's not born from sentimentality—it's
because you're strong.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Groove...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Thank you. I love you, my dear Empress.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...Okay, and we're done here. Hurry up and do
what needs to be done!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe, okay. Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I'm back, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Pardon?
choice_data_list: You still have time, don't you?
You still have time, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...!
You're right.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
As long as I'm with you... I can run to the very
ends of the Earth!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Let's make the best memories we can until the
day we have to part!
